traits: Bold, pioneering and impatient; a self-starter who charges head-first and leads from the front. Quick to act, quick to anger, generous once won over.
Steady, sensual and patient; values comfort, beauty and security. Immovably loyal once committed, but stubborn and slow to change course.
Curious, quick-witted and communicative; a natural talker who juggles many interests. Adaptable and social, but restless and hard to pin down.
Nurturing, emotional and protective; deeply tied to home, family and memory. Intuitive and caring, yet moody and quick to retreat into their shell.
Regal, warm-hearted and proud; a born leader who craves recognition and shines in the spotlight. Generous and loyal, but ego-driven when slighted.
Analytical, precise and service-minded; notices every detail and strives to improve things. Practical and helpful, but prone to worry and over-criticism.
Charming, fair-minded and relationship-oriented; seeks harmony, beauty and balance in all things. Diplomatic and sociable, but indecisive when forced to choose.
Intense, magnetic and secretive; feels everything deeply and probes beneath the surface. Fiercely loyal and transformative, but jealous and slow to forgive.
Optimistic, philosophical and freedom-loving; a seeker of truth, travel and higher meaning. Honest and enthusiastic, but blunt and averse to being tied down.
Ambitious, disciplined and patient; climbs steadily toward long-term goals through hard work. Responsible and enduring, but reserved and prone to pessimism.
Independent, humanitarian and unconventional; an original thinker drawn to ideas and collective causes. Friendly yet detached, marching to their own beat.
Compassionate, dreamy and spiritual; boundlessly empathic and imaginative, dissolving the line between self and other. Gentle and artistic, but escapist and easily overwhelmed.
